title: The Delimitation Act, 2002
full_text: The Delimitation Act, 2002 परिसीमन अधिनियम, 2002 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200233 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 2002-06-03 Act Year: 2002 Short Title: The Delimitation Act, 2002 Hindi Title: परिसीमन अधिनियम, 2002 Long Title: An Act to provide for the readjustment of the allocation of seats in the House of the People to the States, the total number of seats in the Legislative Assembly of each State, the division of each State and each Union territory having a Legislative Assembly into territorial constituencies for elections to the House of the People and Legislative Assemblies of the States and Union territories and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 03-06-2002 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Delimitation Act, 2002 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution of Delimitation Commission. Section 4. Duties of the Commission. Section 5. Associate members. Section 6. Casual vacancies. Section 7. Procedure and powers of the Commission. Section 8. Readjustment of number of seats. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Delimitation of constituencies. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Publication of orders and their date of operation. Show Related Subordinates Section 10A. Deferment of delimitation in certain cases. Section 10B. Delimitation Commission's order with respect to the State of Jharkhand not to have any legal effect. Section 11. Power to maintain delimitation orders up-to-date. Section 12. Repeal.
